description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set within a fenced rectangular lot featuring a spacious green lawn, a swimming pool, and paved walkways. The house has a white exterior with large windows, flat and slightly sloped roof sections, and multiple outdoor living spaces including a patio and a balcony. The front entrance is accessed by a wide staircase flanked by shrubs, leading to a prominent double-door entry. A detached garage with a dark roof sits adjacent to the main building, connected by a paved driveway. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a row of tall, slender trees providing privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of functional outdoor and indoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story white house with large windows, a detached garage, swimming pool, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a fence. Features include a wide staircase entry, multiple patios, and a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wide staircase, double doors, detached garage, and swimming pool on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, row of tall trees, and the pool area, with the house's rear patio partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard patio with outdoor furniture, multiple windows, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, row of trees, and the pool, with the house's side and rear features visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a double-door entry, flanked by shrubs, with no porch or overhang
